reasoning: A Minecraft Movie set a very high bar for 2025 with an opening weekend of $162.7 million. Trades track 'Wicked: For Good' for an opening around $112-$115 million, with an upper bound by Boxoffice Pro of $155 million. Even though Wicked had strong first-day presales, it is likely to be presale-heavy (and walk-up light) compared to A Minecraft Movie and will likely fall short of the $162.7M mark. Furthermore, even if it did overperform, it would also have to fend off another late-year blockbuster in 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' in December. The path to #1 requires an unprecedented sequence of overperformance and luck.
batch_queries: Will 'Wicked: For Good' have the best domestic opening weekend in 2025?
